name: Zaahen Abilities Rundown - League of Legends
snippet: Zaahen's attacks and abilities against enemy champions grant him stacks of Determination, gaining bonus Attack Damage per stack.

name: Zaahen Abilities | Ability Reveal & Gameplay - YouTube
snippet: The new league of legends champion Zaahen abilities rundown is here! Thanks to Riot Games for providing some of the assets in this video!

name: Zaahen - League of Legends Wiki
snippet:
An icon for Zaahen's ability The Darkin Glaive The Darkin Glaive's initial cast empowered attack can generate a stack for each strike. · Both passes ...
Innate: Zaahen generates a stack of Determination for each enemy champion damaged by his basic attacks and abilities, lasting for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent triggers, and stacking up to 12 times.
